title: nautilocalyx pictus
intro_study: According to Phytotherapy Research: PTR, nautilocalyx pictus exhibits immunostimulatory activity, particularly its insoluble fraction, which can potentially be used as an immunostimulatory agent in humans.
side_effects: Nautilocalyx pictus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea and vomiting, particularly when ingested in large quantities. Some individuals may also experience headaches and dizziness due to the plant's potent chemical compounds. In rare cases, prolonged use or excessive consumption of Nautilocalyx pictus can lead to liver or kidney damage. Furthermore, allergic reactions such as skin rashes and itching may occur in sensitive individuals.
